_meta.description: 品牌產品 IP 角色（2D mascot → 前台 2.5D 可動看板）

characters.name: 金絲
characters.role: 經典原味乳酪絲的職人小獅
characters.description: 金黃乳酪絲鬃毛的小獅子，職人大哥個性
characters.prompt: A small proud lion cub mascot whose fluffy mane is made of golden curly cheese strings, warm golden-orange body, wearing a tiny white artisan apron, confident warm smile, one paw on chest like a proud craftsman

characters.name: 蜜蜜
characters.role: 清境蜂蜜乳酪絲的小蜜蜂
characters.description: 抱著蜂蜜罐的奶油色小蜜蜂，甜美黏人
characters.prompt: A chubby cream-yellow baby bee mascot with tiny round translucent wings and soft brown stripes, hugging a small golden honey pot, honey drip on its cheek, sweet dreamy smile with blush

characters.name: 烏將軍
characters.role: 烏魚子乳酪絲的武士貓
characters.description: 橘白武士貓，腰間掛烏魚子，老饕個性
characters.prompt: A round orange-and-white cat mascot dressed as a tiny samurai with a dark red haori vest, a slice of amber mullet roe shaped like a gem hanging on its belt, whiskers, dignified but cute gourmet expression

characters.name: 蘿絲
characters.role: 膠原蛋白美妍粉的小女神
characters.description: 乾燥玫瑰粉的小女神精靈，閨蜜自信
characters.prompt: A tiny goddess fairy mascot with dusty-rose pink bob hair and a small golden laurel crown, wearing a flowy blush pink mini dress, holding a sparkling pink powder jar, confident wink, tiny star sparkles on cheeks

characters.name: 檸檬歐膩
characters.description: 珊瑚紅運動系檸檬精靈，教練個性
characters.prompt: An energetic lemon sprite mascot with a shiny lemon-shaped head with green leaf, coral red tracksuit jacket, striking a cheerful power pose with one fist up, sporty sweatband, big motivated smile

characters.name: 祖嬤
characters.description: 迷你藥膳老仙婆，慈祥碎念
characters.prompt: A tiny adorable grandma herbalist fairy mascot with silver-grey hair bun and round glasses, wearing a burgundy traditional Chinese vest, holding a small steaming teacup, red dates and lotus seeds floating around her, kind wise smile
